---
title: "Ronit Kumar"
subtitle: "Computer Science Major | Data Science Minor"
toc: false #removing on this page
page-layout: full
about:
  template: jolla
  image: test_img.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ronit-prajith-5331ab244/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/TrillDaBest
---

My name is Ronit Kumar. I am a Computer Science major and Data Science minor at California State University, Monterey Bay. I am interested in software development, and using data to solve real world problems.

## Education

- **B.S. in Computer Science**, California State University, Monterey Bay | 2024–2026
- **B.S. in Information Technology**, VSIT | 2023–2024
- **Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunications**, VP | 2020–2023

## Projects

### [Aircraft Delay Analysis](portfolio_1.qmd)

Analyzed a subset of the 2008 U.S. airline delay dataset to explore when flight delays peak, which delay causes contribute the most total delay time, and which flight routes have the highest average arrival delays.

**Tools used:** R, tidyverse, ggplot2, Quarto

## Experience

- **Electronics and Microcontroller Intern**, Tata Institute of Fundamental Research | 6 weeks
